mnemonics.title: Quantifier Order
mnemonics.content: For nested quantifiers, remember: 'For All comes first, There Exists comes second' mirrors the logical order ∀ before ∃ in many statements.

mnemonics.title: Clause Conversion Steps
mnemonics.content: Every Student Should Study Properly Carefully: Eliminate, Standardize, Skolemize, Prenex, CNF, Clauses
